name: hotel room
hints: A hotel room. Try ringing a bell here.
HIT BELL (if carrying the bell) to ring for room service.
HIT BELL summons a ghost who drops something useful.
HIT BELL with the large bell from the saloon. The ghost appears and drops an item. W=lobby (28).
notes: Hotel room. HIT BELL (from saloon) summons a ghost who drops an item. W=lobby (28).
